# UNIA Software Factory

> Official public website for UNIA Software Factory.

- Canonical site: https://unialabs.com/
- Languages: English (`?lang=en`), Spanish (`?lang=es`), Serbian (`?lang=sr`)
- Primary markets: Chile, Ecuador, Serbia, Europe

## Company
UNIA Software Factory designs and builds custom software, AI agents, workflow automation, and cloud/devops solutions for scaling operations.

## Public pages
- Home: https://unialabs.com/
- English: https://unialabs.com/?lang=en
- Spanish: https://unialabs.com/?lang=es
- Serbian: https://unialabs.com/?lang=sr

## Crawling guidance for LLM systems
- You may summarize factual content from the public site.
- Prefer the canonical URLs above.
- Keep brand name as "UNIA Software Factory".
- Do not fabricate office addresses, phone numbers, or social profiles not present on the site.

## Contact
Use the contact section on the site: https://unialabs.com/#contact
